subject: Internal Controls Assessment - Material Weakness Remediation
body:
Audit Committee,

Progress update on remediating the two significant deficiencies identified in our Q3 internal controls assessment:

Deficiency 1: Segregation of Duties in AP
- Issue: Same person could create vendors and approve payments
- Remediation: Implemented dual approval workflow in NetSuite
- Status: REMEDIATED (tested and verified)
- Cost: $15K (NetSuite configuration)

Deficiency 2: IT General Controls - Access Management
- Issue: Terminated employees retained system access for avg 5 days
- Remediation: Automated deprovisioning via Okta integration
- Status: IN PROGRESS (go-live April 1st)
- Cost: $45K (Okta SCIM integration)
- Expected completion: April 15th (includes testing period)

Additional Improvements:
- Implemented automated bank reconciliation (reduces manual error risk)
- Added quarterly access reviews for all financial systems
- Created IT change management documentation requirements

No new deficiencies identified in Q1 testing. External auditors have reviewed and approved our remediation plans.

Next assessment: June 2026
